nasb.text: then the priest shall order them to tear out the stones with the mark in them and throw them away at an unclean place outside the city.

esv.text: then the priest shall command that they take out the stones in which is the disease and throw them into an unclean place outside the city.

cnv.text: 祭司就要吩咐人把染有病症的石頭挖出來，扔在城外不潔淨的地方，

ccb.text: 就要下令拆掉有霉斑的石块，丢到城外不洁净的地方，
